    2

methods.name: fbdev.comp.base_component.BaseComponent.create_component
documentation:
Creates a new instance of the component class, with the given arguments.
Overload to modify the behaviour (for example, to allow modification of `port_spec`)

methods.name: fbdev.comp.port.PortSpecCollection.copy
documentation: Note: The copy is not readonly.

methods.name: fbdev._utils.task_manager.TaskManager.exec_coros
documentation:
Run a coroutine and monitor for exceptions in the coroutine, as well as
any exceptions that occurs in the task manager. Therefore, for it to work
as expected, the coroutine must be starting tasks using self.create_task(),
or tasks that are created by task managers linked to this task manager.

functions.name: fbdev._utils.misc.get_caller_module
documentation: Gets the `__module__` of the caller of the function from within which `get_caller_module` is called from.

classes.name: fbdev.exceptions.FBRuntimeError
documentation:
Errors raised from within the fbdev runtime (as opposed to from within the user-defined
logic inside components.) Always subclass, do not raise directly.

classes.name: fbdev.exceptions.EdgeError
documentation: Errors raised from within the runtime of an edge.

classes.name: fbdev.exceptions.NodeError
documentation: Errors raised from within the runtime of a node.

classes.name: fbdev.exceptions.ComponentError
documentation:
Errors raised from within the runtime of a component (as opposed to from within the flow logic).
Always subclass, do not raise directly.

methods.name: fbdev._utils.TaskManager.exec_coros
documentation:
Run a coroutine and monitor for exceptions in the coroutine, as well as
any exceptions that occurs in the task manager. Therefore, for it to work
as expected, the coroutine must be starting tasks using self.create_task(),
or tasks that are created by task managers linked to this task manager.

functions.name: fbdev.graph._utils.graph_spec_to_mermaid.graph_to_mermaid
documentation:
TB - Top to bottom
TD - Top-down/ same as top to bottom
BT - Bottom to top
RL - Right to left
LR - Left to right

methods.name: fbdev.graph.packet_registry.PacketRegistry._register_packet
documentation: This method should only be called within the constructor of TrackedPacket.

classes.name: fbdev.concurrent.remote.ProxyEventMediator
documentation: ProxyEventMediator._clear will have to be called manually if the event is set and cleared on the remote side.

classes.name: fbdev.graph.net.NodePort
documentation: Ports in a Node will be converted to NodePorts. This is to facilitate addressing. It's mostly cosmetics.

classes.name: fbdev.graph.graph_spec.NodePortSpec
documentation:
PortSpecs in a NodeSpec and GraphSpec will be converted NodePortSpecs. This is to allow the `>>` and `<<` operator overloading
for less verbose graph creation.

classes.name: fbdev.runtime.batch_executor.BatchExecutor

methods.name: fbdev.runtime.batch_executor.BatchExecutor.start
documentation: Note: this method cannot be run from within an event loop.
Executes a net like a batch process (input fed in the beginning, and no input during the execution, and output is returned at the end).

classes.name: fbdev.runtime.node_process.NodeProcessPort
documentation: NodePorts are a wrapper around NodePorts that allows for calling put and put_value without awaiting.

methods.name: fbdev.runtime.node_process.NodeProcess.start
documentation: Note: this method cannot be run from within an event loop.
